problem_context.expected_behavior: Return NONE when the node is last, otherwise its abstract successor; preserve the entire list.
problem_context.input_output_contract: Require full list predicate plus a logical membership/split identifying the node; return same list predicate and sequence-derived result.
problem_context.problem_statement: Verify successor observation for a node belonging to an arbitrary circular doubly linked list.
reference_case_hints: Strictly follow separation-predicate style of QCP_demos_LLM singly-linked-list examples; adapt it to bidirectional circular sentinel lists.
spec_hint: Use bidirectional prefix/node/suffix segmentation so ownership is not duplicated.
